name: Ubiquiti Gigabit Power Adapter POE-24-12W-G
title: Ubiquiti Gigabit Power Adapter POE-24-12W-G
title_extended: Ubiquiti 24V Gigabit PoE Adapter POE-24-12W-G for UniFi & airMAX Devices
description: The Ubiquiti POE-24-12W-G is a Power over Ethernet (PoE) adapter designed to supply reliable power and data connectivity to Ubiquiti devices over a single Ethernet cable. Engineered to meet the power needs of various Ubiquiti networking products, this adapter delivers 24V at 0.5A, providing a total power output of 12W

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text: Surge protection, Clamping protection, Maximum surge discharge, Peak pulse current, AC cable with earth ground

detailed_description.heading: Performance and Operation
detailed_description.text: The POE-24-12W-G operates with an input voltage range of 100-240V AC at 50/60 Hz, making it compatible with power systems worldwide. It converts this input to a stable 24V DC output at 0.5A, ensuring consistent power delivery to connected devices. With a maximum power output of 12W, it is capable of powering a variety of Ubiquiti products, including access points, bridges, and other networking equipment that operate on 24V passive PoE. It is also equipped with two Gigabit Ethernet ports, the adapter supports data rates of up to 1 Gbps, ensuring high-speed data transmission alongside power delivery. This feature is essential for maintaining optimal network performance, especially in setups where bandwidth-intensive applications are in use.

detailed_description.heading: Safety and Protection
detailed_description.text: Constructed from high-quality materials, the POE-24-12W-G is built to withstand daily operational stresses and environmental factors. Its robust design ensures longevity and reliable performance in various conditions. The compact form factor allows for easy integration into any network setup, and the lightweight design makes it convenient to handle during installation. Moreover, this adapter incorporates multiple safety features, including surge protection and overcurrent protection, to safeguard both the PoE adapter and the connected devices. These features are crucial for preventing damage caused by power surges, spikes, and other electrical anomalies. Additionally, the device is compliant with international safety standards, ensuring reliable and secure operation.

detailed_description.heading: ESD Protection
detailed_description.text: Electrostatic discharge (ESD) is the leading cause for outdoor device failures. You can effectively protect against ESD damage using a grounded Ubiquiti PoE Adapter, special cables and cable connectors.

detailed_description.heading: Installation and Compatibility
detailed_description.text: Installation of the POE-24-12W-G is straightforward, thanks to its plug-and-play design. Users simply need to connect the adapter to an AC power source and link the Ethernet cable from the PoE port to the Ubiquiti device requiring power. The second Ethernet port can be used to connect to the network, facilitating both power and data connectivity through a single cable. This adapter is compatible with a wide range of Ubiquiti devices that support 24V passive PoE, making it a versatile addition to any network deployment.
